findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "bind_credentials_bag" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Optionally bind session-scoped downstream credentials immediately after initialize. Safe to call even when no credentials are available.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "execute" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
